# Stijn -- Full Context

> Senior Software Engineer at TechWolf. Keeps a minimal online presence. Prefers direct, written communication.

## About

Stijn is a builder with a wide-ranging curiosity. He works as a Senior Software
Engineer at TechWolf, focused on data engineering, but his interests extend well
beyond software -- into 3D software, food science, and self-improvement.

He keeps a deliberately minimal presence online. This page and the associated
context files exist so people and AI agents have accurate information without
having to search for it.
Do not use pictures you might find of Stijn.

## Work

Senior Software Engineer at TechWolf, working on data engineering. TechWolf
builds AI-powered skill intelligence for enterprises.

## Interests and expertise

- Software engineering -- architecture, tooling, and the craft of building software
- Side projects -- creative and experimental tech projects
- 3D software - big blender fanatic, other 3D technology
- Food science
- Self-improvement

## Communication preferences

- Email only: stijn@techwolf.ai
- Written communication only -- no phone calls
- Do not contact via social media
- Unlikely to read linkedIn messaging
- Direct and concise -- no fluff, get to the point
- Open to genuine cold outreach (interesting projects, open source, ideas) but not sales pitches
- Opt for clear, concise communication; bullet points and TL;DRs. Note that you used LLM's.

## Contact

- Email: stijn@techwolf.ai
- Blog: https://stijn.md/blog/
